Dentistry (BDS & MDS) – Fixed clinic hours, fewer emergencies.

What's new at H.G.E.A. College of Pharmacy? Admissions are open for 2023 batch. Candidates can apply online by visiting the official website. Additionally, HGEA, College of Pharmacy have released the prospectus for the year 2023-24. The college has not released the placement data for the year 2023. The college offers 100% placement assistance to BPharma students. However, the college conducted a placement drive with Brahmananda Narayana Multispeciality Hospital located at Jamshedpur from the graduating batch 2028-20. A total of 10 students participated in the placement drive 2020.

College of Pharmacy courses are provided in several streams including Medicine & Health Sciences, etc. The institute has a total seat intake of 120 students. The fees at H.G.E.A.
